MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Tim Barrows.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Aisha Ivory is present.
Attorney Sebastian Kaplan representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of DEC-10-2012 is vacated.
